title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we know it, it's time for the Japanese
Derby. Fuji Kiseki is courteous to the reporters
crowding her for quotes and entertains them with
humor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The audience's expectations for her are high, and
the younger student watches with mixed feelings.
Fuji Kiseki carries all their emotions upon her
shoulders as she enters the race.
